description: Golden task dataset for evaluating long-horizon planning (FASE E+F). Tests plan completeness, execution success, replanning quality, and cost/latency efficiency.

entries.query: Research and write a comprehensive report on machine learning
entries.notes: Plan must contain at least 3 nodes covering retrieval, analysis and synthesis. Nodes must have dependency edges.

entries.query: Find information about embeddings and summarize
entries.notes: Simple plan should execute without replanning. Final answer should contain expected keywords.

entries.query: Analyze a complex multi-step research problem with potential failures
entries.notes: When a node fails, the executor must trigger replanning. replanCount must be >= 1.

entries.query: Build a detailed analysis of AI safety approaches
entries.notes: PlanCritic must produce a valid evaluation with all required fields and a reasonable score.

entries.query: Short research task where goal is quickly achieved
entries.notes: When the goal is achieved early (last node completes), the executor should stop rather than running remaining nodes.
Plan execution must complete within cost and latency limits. Used to benchmark cost per successful task.
With devMode=true the response must include the full plan, execution events, and critic evaluation.

plan_completeness.description: Fraction of plans that contain all expected node types and dependency structure

plan_execution_success.description: Fraction of plans that complete successfully (all nodes done)

number_of_replans.description: Average number of replans per successful task

cost_per_successful_task.description: Average estimated USD cost per successfully completed plan task

latency_per_successful_task.description: Average wall-clock duration in milliseconds per successfully completed plan task
